scripts.dev: npm run dev:infra && concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.seed:entries: cd backend && MONGODB_URI=mongodb://worklog:worklog@127.0.0.1:27017/worklog?authSource=worklog REDIS_URL=redis://127.0.0.1:6379 bun run seed:entries
scripts.test: npm exec vitest run -w @worklog/shared && npm exec vitest run -w @worklog/frontend && cd backend && bunx vitest run
